text: Stepping into this brightly lit, futuristic space, I feel a gentle excitement mixed with curiosity. There’s a sense of anticipation, as if discovery and innovation hide just beyond the glass. The purple glow and text about research and development evoke a feeling of being on the cusp of possibility—yet I am slightly out of place, an observer trying to understand the blend of human endeavor and technology. I feel the need to reflect quietly, pondering my place amid this dialogue between vision and reality.
